_about: Schema for data/name_roster.json (gitignored — holds real family names). Used by the m9a-family-names detector. 'people' feeds the phonetic layer: each canonical spelling is matched against transcript tokens by Double Metaphone codes (primary + secondary). 'aliases' is the exact-match layer for front-of-word distortions the phonetic codes cannot reach: 'token' is the CLEANED form (lowercased, punctuation and possessive stripped). An alias whose own codes already reach a canonical is redundant and rejected at load time.
